title: ARI dashboard Checkpoint (GET /api/checkpoints item)
description: One item of the bare list returned by GET /api/checkpoints (api_settings-adjacent checkpoint_api._api_checkpoints, line 78). Mirrors frontend/src/types/index.ts Checkpoint (lines 24-36). Every key in 'required' is initialised unconditionally in the per-directory info dict (checkpoint_api.py:96-97), so it is always present; 'best_metric' is documented as always-null (never reassigned). 'best_scientific_score' is conditional (only when tree nodes carry metrics._scientific_score, checkpoint_api.py:166-173) and is therefore optional.
